pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Jakarta EE ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces; Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses jakarta.* namespaces.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17; compiling with Java 8 settings will fail or produce incompatible bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade PrimeFaces version to 14.0.15-LTS to support Jakarta EE namespaces.
pom.xml.why_exists: PrimeFaces 8.0 uses javax.faces namespaces which are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x); version 14+ is required for Jakarta compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade CDI API version to 4.0.1 to align with Jakarta EE 10 specifications.
pom.xml.why_exists: CDI 2.0 uses javax.enterprise namespaces; CDI 4.0 uses jakarta.enterprise namespaces required by Spring Boot 3.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace removed javax.inject APIs.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject is no longer available in the default classpath of Jakarta EE 9+/Spring Boot 3.x; explicit dependency on jakarta.inject-api is required.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add 'jakarta' classifier to PrimeFaces dependency to use the Jakarta EE artifact.
pom.xml.why_exists: The default PrimeFaces artifact uses javax.* namespaces; the 'jakarta' classifier provides the version compatible with Jakarta EE 9+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.enterprise.cdi-api with jakarta.enterprise.cdi-api to migrate to Jakarta EE namespaces.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.enterprise package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code and dependencies must use jakarta.enterprise.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Apache HttpClient 4.x with HttpClient 5.x to align with Jakarta EE and Spring Boot 3.x dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: HttpClient 4.x depends on javax.* APIs or is incompatible with the Jakarta EE 9+ classpath structure; HttpClient 5.x is the Jakarta-compatible successor.

src/main/java/co/com/gsdd/earthquake/Ear.general_idea: Migrate JSF import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
src/main/java/co/com/gsdd/earthquake/Ear.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.faces does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; the class must be imported from jakarta.faces.

src/main/java/co/com/gsdd/earthquake/bea.general_idea: Migrate JSF SessionScoped annotation from javax to jakarta namespace for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/co/com/gsdd/earthquake/bea.why_exists: The javax.faces package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.faces.bean does not exist'.

src/main/java/co/com/gsdd/earthquake/bea.general_idea: Migrate CDI Named annotation from javax to jakarta namespace for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/co/com/gsdd/earthquake/bea.why_exists: The javax.inject package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.inject does not exist'.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..general_idea: Update JSF HTML namespace from javax to jakarta for Jakarta EE compatibility.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; using javax namespaces causes runtime ClassNotFound or deployment failures.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..general_idea: Update PrimeFaces namespace to the Jakarta EE compatible format.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..why_exists: PrimeFaces versions compatible with Jakarta EE/Spring Boot 3 require the new namespace URI; old URI may fail to resolve components.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/faces-config.xml.general_idea: Migrate JSF configuration from Java EE (javax) namespace to Jakarta EE (jakarta) namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Java 17 requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/faces-config.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ require the 'jakarta.*' namespace; using the old 'javax.*' or 'jcp.org' namespace causes runtime failures or class loading errors as the javax namespace is no longer present in the classpath.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.general_idea: Update JSF Facelets namespace from javax to jakarta
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ require the 'jakarta.*' namespace; using 'javax.*' or 'jcp.org' URIs results in a runtime error where Facelets cannot resolve the tag library.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.general_idea: Update JSF HTML namespace from javax to jakarta
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ require the 'jakarta.*' namespace; using 'javax.*' or 'jcp.org' URIs results in a runtime error where Facelets cannot resolve the tag library.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.general_idea: Update JSF Core namespace from javax to jakarta
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ require the 'jakarta.*' namespace; using 'javax.*' or 'sun.com' URIs results in a runtime error where Facelets cannot resolve the tag library.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.general_idea: Update PrimeFaces namespace to match Jakarta EE migration
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.why_exists: PrimeFaces versions compatible with Jakarta EE 9+ (required by Spring Boot 3) use the simplified 'primefaces' namespace; the old 'primefaces.org/ui' URI may fail to resolve components in the new environment.

src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.general_idea: Update JSF HTML namespace from javax to jakarta
src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.why_exists: JSF 4.x (Jakarta EE 10) requires the 'jakarta.faces.html' namespace; the old 'java.sun.com' namespace is invalid and will cause component resolution failures at runtime.

src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.general_idea: Update JSF Core namespace from javax to jakarta
src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.why_exists: JSF 4.x (Jakarta EE 10) requires the 'jakarta.faces.core' namespace; the old 'java.sun.com' namespace is invalid and will cause component resolution failures at runtime.

src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.general_idea: Update JSF Facelets namespace from javax to jakarta
src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.why_exists: JSF 4.x (Jakarta EE 10) requires the 'jakarta.faces.facelets' namespace; the old 'java.sun.com' namespace is invalid and will cause component resolution failures at runtime.

src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.general_idea: Update PrimeFaces namespace to match Jakarta EE migration
src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.why_exists: PrimeFaces versions compatible with Jakarta EE 10/JSF 4.x typically use the simplified 'primefaces' namespace or require specific configuration; the old namespace may not resolve correctly with the updated library version.
